data.body: Remove OpenRouterAgentTarget from types-agent-target.ts (simplify AgentTarget to just CliAgentTarget). Remove 'openrouter' from RegisteredAgent.kind in types.ts. Remove openrouterAgentSchema, openrouterAgentsMapSchema, openrouterSettingsSchema and helpers from schemas.ts. Remove 'openrouter' field from foolerySettingsSchema.
data.title: Remove OpenRouter types and schemas
